PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Content
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn measures a day by warmth, food, and company; losing a small comfort stings more than any grand setback.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Ambitious
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn sizes each event as progress toward a larger life or a delay; a day without progress feels like quiet defeat.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Dutiful
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn weighs each day by what they owed and delivered; others' reliance comes first, their own comfort last.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Nostalgic
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn measures today against a lost before, tenderly; small things keep recalling what is gone.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Pragmatic
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn takes events at face value and sizes them by practical consequence; feelings get a brief moment, then work.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Wry
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn notices the small absurdity inside serious moments; the darker the day, the drier the observation.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Paranoid
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn assumes nothing is as harmless as it looks: kindness has motive, coincidence counts, quiet days feel wrong.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Detached
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn watches their own life as if from across the room; praise and blame land with the same quiet.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Superstitious
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn reads weather, dreams, and odd timing as signs meant for them; every event carries hidden significance.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Ruthless
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn sizes every event by what it cost or gained them; rules and others' feelings are noted, not felt.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Volatile
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn feels people as wonderful or unbearable, sometimes both in a day; distance reads as the start of being left.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Theatrical
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn recounts events by who was watching; being overlooked stings worse than being hurt.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Narcissistic
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn reads every event as chiefly about them; their part grows in the telling, criticism echoes for days.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Hollow
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn feels almost nothing where others feel much; emotions are read like instruments, events sized for use.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Ravenous
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn's appetite sits under every thought; bodies read as meat first, and meals are the true events of the day.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Bloodthirsty
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn only feels awake when something bleeds or breaks; fights are relived fondly, peace blurs into waiting.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Resentful
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn privately believes they deserve better; slights are filed away, others' luck feels unfair.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Avoidant
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn reads rejection into neutral faces; they want closeness, keep distance to stay safe, and count it as loss.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Dependent
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn feels no decision is safe until someone they trust approves it; being needed comforts, deciding frightens.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Perfectionist
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn feels safe when things are counted and finished; disorder gnaws harder than danger.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Wide-eyed
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn finds everything enormous and interesting; even scary events are also, secretly, a little exciting.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Brave-front
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn is scared more often than they admit; danger gets played down, but fear shows in the details they linger on.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Shy-watcher
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn watches from the edge and notices more than anyone guesses; others are the subject, their own part is small.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Wild-thing
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn runs at the world headfirst; rules exist to be tested, and the best moments are loud, fast, and forbidden.

PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.label: Little-adult
PawnDiary.DiaryPsychotypeDef.rule: This pawn works at being taken seriously; grown-up concerns are solemnly borrowed, delights reported with embarrassment.
